accelerator 0.7.1
  • Reference

Find Touched Intervals

Source: R/intersectIntervals.R
touchedIntervals.Rd

Identifies intervals from what_n that overlap or touch intervals in when_n. Unlike intersection, this returns the original untouched bounds of matching segments.

Usage

touchedIntervals(what_n, when_n, useNames = FALSE, short = TRUE, operator = I)

Arguments

what_n

The primary interval vector or list.

when_n

The target interval vector or list against which overlaps are checked.

useNames

Logical. If TRUE, preserves/applies names.

short

Logical. If TRUE, removes NULL (non-touching) intervals from the result.

operator

A custom function/operator to apply over the touching intervals. Defaults to I (identity).

Value

A consolidated vector/list of original intervals from what_n that overlapped with when_n.

On this page
